name: Discord TTS Attacher
description: Synthesize Discord assistant replies to MP3 (Edge TTS) and attach them in a follow-up message.

outputDir.description: Directory for MP3 and markers. Resolved with api.resolvePath if relative. Default: $OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/workspace/TTS or ~/.openclaw/workspace/TTS. Override env: DISCORD_TTS_OUTPUT_DIR.

sendDedupeMs.description: Skip a second TTS run when the same text+target flushes again within this many ms (0 = off).

debounceMs.description: Wait this long after the last text chunk before synthesizing (burst aggregation).

pickupIntervalMs.description: How often the gateway polls for worker completion.

pickupTimeoutMs.description: Minimum time to wait for the MP3; actual wait is at least this and scales with estimated synthesis time.

synthTimeoutBaseMs.description: Base ms added to per-character estimate for Edge TTS timeout.

synthTimeoutPerCharMs.description: Ms per character added to synthesis timeout estimate.

synthTimeoutJitterMs.description: Extra ms buffer added to synthesis timeout estimate.

synthTimeoutMaxMs.description: Cap for synthesis timeout passed to node-edge-tts and Promise.race.
